theme_rankings.why_now: HBM4·CoWoS·EUV 모두 캐파 부족 지속. 2027까지 수요 가시성 확보된 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 정점 논쟁 + 중국 수출 규제 변동성. 어닝 미스 시 30% 낙폭 흔함.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🚂 AI의 '밴더빌트' — 실제 업무에 AI 박는 운영자
theme_rankings.why_now: 추론 비용 90% 하락 + 엔터프라이즈 도입 본격. 진짜 텐베거 후보가 여기서 다수.
theme_rankings.risk: 밸류에이션 과열. 매출 성장 30%+ 못 보이면 멀티플 압축.

theme_rankings.why_now: 강한 추세장에서만 사용. 분할매수 + 손절선 명확히 + 자산의 5~10% 이하.
theme_rankings.risk: 장기 보유 ❌. 횡보·하락장에선 음의 복리(volatility decay)로 손실 누적.

theme_rankings.why_now: AI가 돌아가려면 전기 필요. 미국 변압기 대기 100주+ → 만드는 회사들 5년치 일감 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 후반 진입 우려는 아직 작지만, 금리 급등 시 인프라주 동반 조정.

theme_rankings.why_now: MSFT·GOOG·META·AMZN 2026 Capex 합계 $400B+. AI 매출 회수 본격화 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 광고·소비 둔화 시 Capex 가이던스 컷 가능. 빅테크 동반 변동성.

theme_rankings.why_now: 인지노동 다음은 물리노동. 2027~2030 진정한 텐베거 가능 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 상용화 시점 불확실. 미래 옵션밸류 비중 큼. 변동성 극심.

narrative.summary: AppLovin: 정량 종합 69점, 라벨 ACCUMULATE. 단기 59 / 중기 78 / 장기 67. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 정상
overheat.guidance: 진입 OK. 종합 점수가 좋다면 매수 검토.

guidance.basis: ATR(14) 5.7% → 2-ATR 손절폭 11.4%. 포트폴리오의 1%만 risk-on (1번 손절 = 자산 1% 손실).

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 2개 시그널 합류 — 주봉 50MA, Value Area High. 현재가 대비 +7.4% 위치. T1 $596.6 (R:R 1.5)
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $523 아래 손절가 $473.3 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

top_news.title: Oil Extends Decline as Barrels Flow Through Strait of Hormuz
top_news.summary: Oil fell for a third day as flows through the Strait of Hormuz surged and there were signs of progress in indirect talks between the US and Iran.

top_news.title: Global Treasurers Fuel Record $36 Billion of Kangaroo Bond Sales
top_news.summary: Australia’s bond market is drawing increasing interest from funding chiefs worldwide, pushing issuance to a record high, as a flood of Asian capital cap borrowing costs and compete for deals.

top_news.title: Cboe Seeks to List Prediction Market Type Options on Earnings Metrics
top_news.summary: Cboe Global Markets Inc. is seeking US regulatory approval to list all-or-nothing options tied to corporate earnings results, allowing traders to wager on figures ranging from SpaceX revenue and Nvidia data-center sales to JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s credit-loss provisions.

top_news.title: Lenders to Clearlake and TA-Backed Tungsten Sign Debt Pact
top_news.summary: Lenders to Tungsten Automation have signed a pact agreeing to work together on a potential debt restructuring following a steep slide in the software company’s debt prices, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_news.title: Hikers Turn to AllTrails App to Navigate Nature
top_news.summary:
AllTrails CEO Liz Hamren is joined by Bloomberg's Adam Thompson to discuss how to navigate the summer hiking season and break down how to visit the most popular national parks but still beat the crowds. 
Hamren said that a key feature to figuring out the right hike is looking at the latest community input on trail difficulty and conditions that can make a big difference in the experience.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Meta Platforms Getting Into Cloud Infrastructure Business | Closing Bell
top_news.summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Katie Greifeld, Bailey Lipschultz, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Japan's $13 Billion Global Anime Merchandise Goal
top_news.summary: Anime has become a global entertainment powerhouse, attracting billions of dollars in investment and fans worldwide. Now, companies including Marubeni are targeting the fast-growing $13 billion merchandise market. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: South Korean Banks Expand Trading Floors for 24-Hour Won Market
top_news.summary: South Korea’s biggest lenders are boosting trading desks in London and Seoul to prepare for the won’s round-the-clock trading starting next week.

top_news.title: REalloys Announces Partnership to Operate on US Army Base
top_news.summary:
REalloys CEO Lipi Sternheim said that members of the US military could be actively involved in working with his company to mine rare earth minerals after the announcement of a deal to let REalloy mine on US Army bases. 
Sternheim said that the partnership with the Army shows how 'strategically important' rare earth metals are to the United States.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Emerging-Market Currencies Erase 2026 Gains as Dollar Advances
top_news.summary: A gauge for emerging-market currencies fell Wednesday, erasing its gains for this year as speculation over higher US interest rates fueled a resurgence in the dollar.
